content.query:
SecureBootCertificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceName
| summarize Total = count()
| extend Result = strcat(Total, " devices")
| project Result
content.title: 💻 Devices count

content.query:
SecureBootCertificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber
| summarize Total = count(),UpToDate = countif(CertActiveDB == "True" and UEFICA2023Status == "Updated" and IsSecureBootEnabled == "True" and WindowsUEFICA2023Capable == 2)
| extend Percentage = round(UpToDate * 100.0 / Total, 2)
| extend Result = strcat( Percentage, "% devices")
| project Result
content.title: ✅ Devices UpToDate

content.query:
SecureBootCertificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber
| summarize Total = count(),UpToDate = countif(LatestEventId == 1800 and BootUptimeDays >= 7 and UEFICA2023Status == "InProgress" )
| extend Percentage = round(UpToDate * 100.0 / Total, 2)
| extend Result = strcat( Percentage, "% devices")
| project Result
content.title: ⏳ Devices waiting for  a reboot

content.query:
SecureBootCertificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber
//| where isnotempty(CertDefaultDB)
| where isnotempty(CertDefaultDBStatus)
| where Manufacturer !contains "Microsoft"
//| summarize Total = count(),UpToDate = countif(CertDefaultDB == "True")
| summarize Total = count(),UpToDate = countif(CertDefaultDBStatus == "OK")
| extend Percentage = round(UpToDate * 100.0 / Total, 2)
| extend Result = strcat( Percentage, "% devices")
| project Result
content.title: 🚀 Minimum BIOS uptodate

content.query:
SecureBootCertificate_CL
| where isnotempty(Manufacturer)
| where Manufacturer !contains "OEMCT"
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Manufacturer
| summarize Total = count()
| extend Result = strcat( Total, " manufacturer(s)")
| project Result
content.title: 👷🏼‍♂️ Manufacturer count

content.query:
SecureBootCertificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber
| extend UpToDate_Devices = UEFICA2023Status == "Updated" and WindowsUEFICA2023Capable == 2
| summarize SecureBootCertificate_CL = count() by tostring(UpToDate_Devices)
content.title: Secure Boot certificate global status

content.query:
SecureBootCertificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber
//| where isnotempty(CertDefaultDB)
| where isnotempty(CertDefaultDBStatus)
| where Manufacturer !contains "Microsoft"
//| summarize SecureBootCertificate_CL = count() by tostring(CertDefaultDB)
| summarize SecureBootCertificate_CL = count() by tostring(CertDefaultDBStatus)
content.title: BIOS minimum update status for certificate

content.query:
SecureBootCertificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber
| where isnotempty(CertActiveDB)
| summarize SecureBootCertificate_CL = count() by tostring(CertActiveDB)
content.title: Certificate found in ActiveDB

content.query:
SecureBootCertificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber
| where isnotempty(IsSecureBootEnabled)
| summarize Count = count() by tostring(IsSecureBootEnabled)
content.title: Secure Boot status

content.query:
SecureBootCertificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber
| where isnotempty(SecureBootTaskStatus)
| summarize SecureBootCertificate_CL = count() by tostring(SecureBootTaskStatus)
content.title: Secure Boot update scheduled task status

content.query:
SecureBootCertificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber
| where isnotempty(UEFICA2023Status)
| summarize SecureBootCertificate_CL = count() by tostring(UEFICA2023Status)
content.title: UEFICA2023 cert deployment status

content.query:
SecureBootCertificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber
| where isnotempty(Manufacturer)
| where Manufacturer !contains "OEMCT"
//| where CertDefaultDB == "False"
| where CertDefaultDBStatus == "Needs update"
| summarize ['Devices count'] = count() by ['Manufacturer']=Manufacturer,Model=ModelFriendlyName
| order by ['Devices count']
content.title: ❌ Models requiring BIOS update

content.query:
SecureBootCertificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber
| where isnotempty(Manufacturer)
| where Manufacturer !contains "OEMCT"
//| where CertDefaultDB == "True"
| where CertDefaultDBStatus == "OK"
| summarize ['Devices count'] = count() by ['Manufacturer']=Manufacturer,Model=ModelFriendlyName
| order by ['Devices count']
content.title: ✔️ Models with BIOS uptodate

content.query:
SecureBootCertificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber
| where isnotempty(Manufacturer)
| where Manufacturer !contains "OEMCT"
| where CertDefaultDBStatus == "Check firmware"
| summarize ['Devices count'] = count() by ['Manufacturer']=Manufacturer,Model=ModelFriendlyName
| order by ['Devices count']
content.title: ⚠️ Models with BIOS status issue

content.query:
SecureBootCertificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber
| where isnotempty(Manufacturer)
| where Manufacturer !contains "OEMCT"
| where CertActiveDB == "False"
| summarize ['Devices count'] = count() by ['Manufacturer']=Manufacturer,Model=ModelFriendlyName
| order by ['Devices count']
content.title: ❌ Models requiring certificate update

content.query:
SecureBootCertificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber
| where isnotempty(Manufacturer)
| where Manufacturer !contains "OEMCT"
| where CertActiveDB == "True"
| summarize ['Devices count'] = count() by ['Manufacturer']=Manufacturer,Model=ModelFriendlyName
| order by ['Devices count']
content.title: ✔️ Models with certificate uptodate

parameters.name: ComputerModel
parameters.label: Filter on device model
parameters.query:
SecureBootCertificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber
| where ModelFriendlyName <> ""
| distinct ModelFriendlyName

parameters.name: Manufacturer
parameters.label: Filter on manufacturer
parameters.query:
SecureBootCertificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber
| where Manufacturer <> ""
| distinct Manufacturer

content.json:
Here we check the registry key UEFICA2023Status located in "HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\SecureBoot\Servicing".

The "Deployment status" corresponding to "UEFICA2023Status" has 3 values: - Updated: The Secure Boot CA 2023 update complete. No action needed on your side. - InProgress: The update is actively in progress. Waiting for a reboot or scheduled task execution. - NoStarted: The deployment is planned, but the update has not yet run.

**Devices waiting for a reboot**

Here we check devices where: - UEFICA2023Status == "InProgress"
- LatestEventId == 1800
- BootUptimeDays >= 7

content.query:
SecureBootCertificate_CL
| where UEFICA2023Status contains "{UEFICA2023Status}"
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber
| where UEFICA2023Status <> "Updated" 
| where IsSecureBootEnabled == "True"
| where ModelFriendlyName has_any ({ComputerModel})
| where Manufacturer has_any ({Manufacturer})
| where "{ComputerName:escape}" == "*" or DeviceName contains "{ComputerName:escape}" or "{ComputerName:escape}" == "All devices"
| project Device=DeviceName,['Deployment status']=UEFICA2023Status,SerialNumber=SerialNumber,Manufacturer=Manufacturer,Model=ModelFriendlyName,CertActiveDB,WindowsUEFICA2023Capable=WindowsUEFICA2023Capable,LatestEventId,['Last reboot']=DeviceUptime,['Last reboot in days']=BootUptimeDays

SecureBootCertificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber
| where IsSecureBootEnabled == "True"
| where ModelFriendlyName has_any ({ComputerModel})
| where Manufacturer has_any ({Manufacturer})
| where LatestEventId == 1800 and BootUptimeDays >= 7 and UEFICA2023Status == "InProgress"
| where "{ComputerName:escape}" == "*" or DeviceName contains "{ComputerName:escape}" or "{ComputerName:escape}" == "All devices"
| project ['Last contact']=TimeGenerated,Device=DeviceName,['Last reboot']=DeviceUptime,['Last reboot in days']=BootUptimeDays,SerialNumber=SerialNumber,Manufacturer=Manufacturer,Model=ModelFriendlyName
//| count
content.title: Devices waiting for a reboot (where last reboot > 7 days)

content.json:
Here we check the value from the below command: (Get-SecureBootUEFI dbdefault).bytes

The return of this command has 2 values: - True: uptodate - False: not uptodate

content.query:
SecureBootCertificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber
//| where isnotempty(CertDefaultDB)
| where isnotempty(CertDefaultDBStatus)
| where Manufacturer !contains "Microsoft"
| where ModelFriendlyName has_any ({ComputerModel})
| where Manufacturer has_any ({Manufacturer})
//| where CertDefaultDB == "False"
| where CertDefaultDBStatus == "Needs update"
| where "{ComputerName:escape}" == "*" or DeviceName contains "{ComputerName:escape}" or "{ComputerName:escape}" == "All devices"
| project Device=DeviceName,SN=SerialNumber,Manufacturer=Manufacturer,Model=ModelFriendlyName,['BIOS version']=BIOSVersion,['BIOS date']=BIOSReleaseDate,CertActiveDB,['Deployment status']=UEFICA2023Status,['Deployment status info']=UEFICA2023Status_Label

SecureBootCertificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber
| where isnotempty(IsSecureBootEnabled)
| where IsSecureBootEnabled == "False"
| where "{ComputerName:escape}" == "*" or DeviceName contains "{ComputerName:escape}" or "{ComputerName:escape}" == "All devices"
| project Device=DeviceName,SN=SerialNumber,Manufacturer,Model=ModelFriendlyName,['Cert deployment status']=UEFICA2023Status,['Cert deployment status label']=UEFICA2023Status_Label
content.title: Devices with Secure Boot disabled

content.query:
SecureBootCertificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber
| where ModelFriendlyName has_any ({ComputerModel})
| where Manufacturer has_any ({Manufacturer})
| where "{ComputerName:escape}" == "*" or DeviceName contains "{ComputerName:escape}" or "{ComputerName:escape}" == "All devices"
| project DeviceName,SerialNumber,IsSecureBootEnabled,Model,ModelFriendlyName,CertActiveDB,CertDefaultDBStatus,Manufacturer,BIOSVersion,UEFICA2023Status,WindowsUEFICA2023Capable,UEFICA2023Status_Label,LatestEventId,RebootPending_b,BIOSReleaseDate,BIOSReleaseDateDaysOld,SMBIOSBIOSVersion,OS_Build,OSInstallDate,OSVersion,DeviceUptime,AvailableUpdates_Convert_Hex,MicrosoftUpdateManagedOptIn_Value,HighConfidenceOptOut_Value,Event1795Count,Event1796Count,Event1800Count,Event1801Count,Event1802Count,Event1803Count,Event1808Count,MissingKEK
content.title: All devices details

content.json:
The data is collected and sent through an Intune remediation script.
The remediation script is executed every day. **Certificate state**
Here we check the deployment status of the certificate using the below registry key: HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\SecureBoot\Servicing\UEFICA2023Status **BIOS check**
In this part, we check the result of the following command: ([System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString((Get-SecureBootUEFI dbdefault).bytes) -match 'Windows UEFI CA 2023')
This command allows you to check if the dbdefault contains the "Windows UEFI CA 2023" cert.

It can be True or False: - True: the device has the minimum BIOS version that - False: the device does not have the minimum BIOS version **Secure boot status**
In this part, we check devices with secure boot enabled or not.
Secure boot is a prerequisite for the certificate update. **Secure boot scheduled task**
In this part, we check the status of the "Secure-Boot-Update" scheduled task. **Event logs**
In this part, we check event IDs in the System event log.
- 1801: Update initiated, reboot required
- 1808: Update completed successfully
- 1795: Firmware returned error
- 1796: Error logged with error code
- 1800: Reboot needed
- 1802: Known firmware issue blocked update
- 1803: Matching KEK update not found
